title: VULKAN++
description:
Build around VulkanMod and ViaFabricPlus for performance and backwards compatibility.
Fully client side, a lot of QoL, vanilla+
body:
Build around VulkanMod for maximum performance.

Increased quality of life, and a lot of bugs fixes.

Enhanced visuals and audio, while staying true to the vanilla experience.

Perfect modpack for low-end systems.

6-7gb ram allocation recommended.

With the use of ViaFabricPlus you are able to join every minecraft server version.

Also LAN hosting of singleplayer worlds has been made easier then ever.

Fully client side, vanilla+
